query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `chapters` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `chapterId` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
  `subject` enum('physics','chemistry','mathematics') NOT NULL,
  `classLevel` int NOT NULL,
  `chapterNo` int NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `ncertChapter` int DEFAULT 0,
  `weightageMain` varchar(16),
  `weightageAdvanced` varchar(16),
  `prerequisites` json DEFAULT ('[]'),
  `keyTopics` json DEFAULT ('[]'),
  `isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `chapters_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `chapters_chapterId_unique` UNIQUE(`chapterId`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `narration_scripts` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `chapterId` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
  `introduction` text,
  `conceptualExplanation` text,
  `formulasAndDerivations` text,
  `solvedExamples` text,
  `advancedConcepts` text,
  `jeeSpecificTips` text,
  `commonMistakes` text,
  `summary` text,
  `wordCount` int DEFAULT 0,
  `generatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `narration_scripts_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `questions` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `chapterId` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
  `subject` enum('physics','chemistry','mathematics') NOT NULL,
  `questionType` enum('mcq','nat','integer','multi_correct') NOT NULL,
  `difficulty` enum('easy','medium','hard') NOT NULL,
  `source` enum('jee_main','jee_advanced','practice') NOT NULL,
  `year` int,
  `questionText` text NOT NULL,
  `options` json,
  `correctAnswer` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `correctOptions` json,
  `solution` text NOT NULL,
  `conceptTested` varchar(256),
  `marks` int DEFAULT 4,
  `negativeMarks` float DEFAULT 1,
  `isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `questions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `assessments` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `chapterId` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `assessmentType` enum('practice','chapter_test','mock_jee') NOT NULL,
  `subject` enum('physics','chemistry','mathematics','combined') NOT NULL,
  `durationMinutes` int DEFAULT 30,
  `totalMarks` int DEFAULT 100,
  `passingScore` int DEFAULT 60,
  `questionIds` json NOT NULL,
  `isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `assessments_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `chapter_progress` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `chapterId` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
  `subject` enum('physics','chemistry','mathematics') NOT NULL,
  `classLevel` int NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('locked','unlocked','in_progress','completed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'locked',
  `narrationRead` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `bestScore` float DEFAULT 0,
  `attemptsCount` int DEFAULT 0,
  `lastAttemptAt` timestamp,
  `completedAt` timestamp,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `chapter_progress_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `assessment_attempts` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `assessmentId` int NOT NULL,
  `chapterId` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
  `attemptType` enum('practice','chapter_test','mock_jee') NOT NULL,
  `answers` json NOT NULL,
  `score` float NOT NULL,
  `maxScore` float NOT NULL,
  `percentage` float NOT NULL,
  `timeTakenSeconds` int,
  `passed` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  `questionResults` json,
  `startedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `completedAt` timestamp,
  CONSTRAINT `assessment_attempts_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `daily_attempt_limits` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `chapterId` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
  `attemptDate` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `attemptsUsed` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `daily_attempt_limits_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `mock_tests` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `testType` enum('subject_mock','full_jee_main','full_jee_advanced') NOT NULL,
  `subject` enum('physics','chemistry','mathematics','combined'),
  `durationMinutes` int DEFAULT 180,
  `totalMarks` int DEFAULT 300,
  `questionIds` json NOT NULL,
  `isActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `mock_tests_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `mock_test_attempts` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `mockTestId` int NOT NULL,
  `answers` json,
  `score` float,
  `maxScore` float,
  `percentage` float,
  `timeTakenSeconds` int,
  `sectionScores` json,
  `startedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `completedAt` timestamp,
  `status` enum('in_progress','completed','abandoned') DEFAULT 'in_progress',
  CONSTRAINT `mock_test_attempts_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
